title: 🏆 World Cup Sports Bar Crawl
description: Check in at 5+ sports bars during World Cup matches.
terms: Reward paid in $FLY after 5 verified check-ins at participating sports bars during World Cup match windows. One reward per restaurant.

title: 🍦 Ice Cream Crawl
description: Check in at 3 different ice cream spots and get at least a scoop within 24 hours.
terms: Reward paid in $FLY after 3 verified check-ins at distinct ice cream spots within a single 24-hour window. One reward per restaurant.
